title: TrashCommand
description: A simple trash can mod that allows undoing the last deletion, requiring only server-side installation.
body:
# TrashCommand
[**简体中文**](https://github.com/chenjunfu2/trashcommand/blob/master/README.md)</br>
**This mod provides the trash command, allowing players to open a trash bin anytime, anywhere to dispose of unwanted items.**
- The mod can be installed server-side only; clients without the mod can still use it normally.
- Items disposed of in the trash bin are not instantly destroyed and can be undone.
- Items remain in the trash bin even after leaving and rejoining the server, allowing for undo functionality.
- Each player has their own independent trash bin.
- The trash bin is cleared the next time the player opens it.
- The instant trash bin is separate from the regular trash bin (does not affect undo functionality of the regular trash bin).

**Command List**
- /trash
  - Opens the trash bin interface (large chest). Players can freely add items for disposal. After closing the interface, the trash bin will be cleared upon next opening to continue disposing of items.
- /trash undo
  - Undoes the last disposal and reopens the trash bin interface (items are restored). (Of course, if you want to use this as extra inventory space, that's possible - but you'll bear the consequences if you accidentally destroy your items.)
- /trash instant
  - Opens the instant trash bin interface (Use with caution! Any items placed inside will disappear immediately with no way to recover them. This is effective for cleaning up large amounts of junk items quickly.)
